privileged_info_summary: Verified that all satellite NORAD IDs correctly map to the requested spacecraft (ZARYA=25544, NAUKA=49044, SUOMI NPP=37849, TIANHE=48274, WENTIAN=53239, MENGTIAN=54216, FY-3A=32958, FY-3B=37214) via public catalog and the environment's TLE text files. Confirmed the geographical coordinates and the UTC display requirement are explicitly detailed in the task description.
